name: CSE — 03 Stack Scoring Engine

parameters.query: SELECT l.id AS listing_id, l.asset_class, l.state, l.county, l.city, l.zip, l.address, l.listing_price, l.units, l.year_built, l.lot_size, e.id AS enrichment_id, e.parcel_number, e.owner_name, e.owner_state, e.is_llc, e.llc_status, e.last_sale_date, e.last_sale_price, e.estimated_market_value, e.has_active_mortgage, e.mortgage_estimated_balance, e.equity_estimate_percent, e.motivation_signals FROM listings l JOIN enriched_properties e ON e.listing_id = l.id WHERE e.equity_estimate_percent >= 60 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scores s WHERE s.enrichment_id = e.id) ORDER BY e.enriched_at DESC LIMIT 10

_notes: Pulls up to 10 unscored properties at a time and batches them into a single Claude Haiku call (cost guardrail). The system prompt body must be pasted from prompts/stack-scoring-prompt.md before activating in n8n. After insert, only HOT-tier scores fire the Hot Lead Router; WARM/COLD are logged only and surface in the Daily Digest.
